# Kotiaurinko

A tiny knowledge bundle about a home star system. This preamble is
hand-written and must survive compilation untouched.

## Concepts

* [Aurinko](aurinko.md) - the star everything orbits
* [Planeetat](planeetat.md) - the catalogue of worlds
* [Maa](maa.md) - the blue one
* [Kuu](kuu.md) - the companion
* [Komeetta](komeetta.md) - the visitor
* [Yksinäinen](yksinainen.md) - the unlinked wanderer
* [Atolli](saaret/atolli.md) - a ring in the sea
* [Laguuni](saaret/laguuni.md) - the water inside the ring

## concepts

- [Aurinko](aurinko.md) — The star everything in this bundle orbits.
- [Komeetta](komeetta.md) — A visitor with a tail, seen only every few decades — pöllämystynyt matkalainen.
- [Kuu](kuu.md)
- [Maa](maa.md) — The blue world with a companion and a home.
- [Planeetat](planeetat.md) — The catalogue of worlds around the star.
- [Yksinäinen](yksinainen.md) — A wanderer no other concept links to.

## saaret

- [Atolli](saaret/atolli.md) — A ring of coral in the island sea.
- [Laguuni](saaret/laguuni.md) — The calm water inside the ring.
